title: Apple's Mac sales grew while most PC makers saw drops in Q2
description: In the computer market in the second quarter of this year, there was only one clear winner: Apple. It's the only company that managed to gain market share compared to the same period last year, as its shipments grew by 10.1%, according to a new IDC report. Apple shipped 6.7 million Macs in Q2 for a 9.9% market share, up from 6.1 million units and 8.5% market share in Q2 2025. Windows PC makers have been hit hard by their own price increases (which are due to the RAM crisis, of course). First-place Lenovo's shipments dropped to 16.6 million units from 17 million in the year-ago...

title: The Samsung Galaxy S26 series breaks a sales record in Korea, boosts the country's exports
description: The Galaxy S26 series has been a smash hit for Samsung – the trio sold 3 million units in its home country of South Korea in just 118 days. That’s under four months. For comparison, the previous Galaxy S25 generation launched in early February and hit the 3 million mark in early August, which is six months. Before that, the S24 series needed two months more to reach the same target. The 2026 flagships started off strong with 1.35 million over 7 days of pre-orders in Korea, up from the previous record of 1.3 million set by the S25 series – and the older models had 11 days of...

title: Huawei teases MatePad Air and FreeClip 2 S ahead of launch
description: Huawei has been on a teaser roll ahead of next week’s Pura 90s series global launch event, and we now have two additional devices that will be showcased alongside the Pura 90s Pro and 90s Pro Max. Huawei is bringing a new MatePad Air to the mix. The device is showcased in pink, white and blue colors, and we can see it features a pill-shaped camera cutout, as well as a stylus and keyboard cover. It remains to be seen what other differences it will feature compared to the MatePad Air (2025). Huawei will also bring its FreeClip 2 S wireless earbuds. These were already announced in...

title: Realme Narzo 100x's specs, price segment, and launch date revealed
description: Realme has announced it will launch a new Narzo Series smartphone on July 15, called the Narzo 100x. The biggest highlight of the Realme Narzo 100x will be its 8,000 mAh battery, advertised as the "segment's biggest." If you are wondering about the price segment, that's INR15,000 to INR20,000. The 8,000 mAh battery, packed inside an 8.8mm thick Narzo 100x, is advertised to offer three days of endurance between charges. It will have 45W charging in addition to reverse wired charging, all-scenario bypass charging, and "AI Cold Mode." Realme hasn't revealed what exactly the AI Cold...

title: The Redmi Note 17 Pro will come with a 5-year battery replacement guarantee
description: Xiaomi is eking out details for the Redmi Note 17 Pro – earlier today, it revealed that the phone is going to have a 9,000mAh battery with 67W fast charging and 22.5W fast reverse charging. There’s more to it than that – Xiaomi believes in its battery tech so much that it offers a 5-year protection plan. If the battery capacity drops below 80% during the first four years of owning your phone, Xiaomi will replace it for free. And if it drops below 80% in the fifth year, Xiaomi will upgrade it for free. You read that right – it will upgrade the battery with a higher capacity one. At the...

title: Meta's smart glasses will disable recording when capture LED is blocked
description: Meta's smart glasses feature a capture LED on the side of the frame that blinks whenever the camera is recording, helping alert people nearby. However, some users have raised concerns that the small indicator is easy to miss. In response, Meta has introduced new privacy-focused safeguards for its latest smart glasses that prevent recording if the capture LED has been tampered with. The feature is currently available on Meta's second-generation smart glasses and newer models, and will roll out to all of the company's smart glasses. The feature can automatically detect if the...

title: HMD Arc 2 announced with updated chipset
description: HMD has quietly announced a successor to its HMD Arc, but while boasting a new name and paint job, it does not bring many noticeable upgrades. Arc 2 still boots Android 14 Go and is built around a 6.52-inch IPS LCD with HD+ resolution and a 60Hz refresh rate. It is equipped with the Unisoc T603 chip, which is a more capable revision of Unisoc SC9863A from the first-generation HMD Arc. The T603 is built on a more efficient 12nm process and features a max clock speed of 1.8 GHz. The chip is paired with 4GB RAM and 64/128GB storage while also boasting an SD card slot. Around...

title: Lava Virat smartphone series introduced in partnership with Flipkart
description: Indian handset maker Lava today introduced its new smartphone series, Virat, in partnership with the Indian online retailer Flipkart. Lava says that the Virat smartphone series is built from the ground up for online-first buyers and will span the sub-INR10,000 to INR25,000 price segments. Every promise kept over the last 17 years led us here.Introducing VIRAT.For India's endless dreams. A smartphone you can trust. 🤝Coming soon on Flipkart.#ComingSoon #Flipkart #LavaMobiles #ProudlyIndian #Shaqhataolavauthao pic.twitter.com/zF4fZI0Jtw— Lava Mobiles (@LavaMobile) July 9, 2026 The...

title: Redmi Note 17 Pro confirmed to pack a 9,000mAh battery
description: Ahead of the Redmi Note 17 series launch next week, the company has been gradually revealing the lineup's key features. It has now confirmed the battery capacity and display features of the Redmi Note 17 Pro. Redmi has confirmed that the Note 17 Pro will pack a 9,000mAh battery with support for 67W wired fast charging and 22.5W reverse wired charging. The company has also announced a free battery replacement policy if the battery's maximum capacity drops below 80 percent within four years of purchase. In addition to the battery details, Redmi confirmed that the Note 17 Pro will...

title: iQOO Z11 Lite’s India launch date revealed
description: After recently teasing the arrival of the iQOO Z11 Lite 5G in India, the company has now confirmed the smartphone's launch date. In a post on X, iQOO India confirmed that the Z11 Lite 5G will launch in the country on July 24. The upcoming phone will succeed the iQOO Z10 Lite, which was unveiled in India in June last year. While the company has yet to reveal the phone's specifications, an Amazon India listing suggests it will support 44W wired charging and be offered in a 4GB/128GB configuration and a Solar Flame colourway. The teaser image shows the handset with a pill-shaped...

title: nubia is launching an AI agent smartphone later this month
description: nubia has announced that it will unveil what it claims is the world's first AI agent smartphone in the coming weeks. The upcoming handset is said to be a successor to the company’s M153 with Doubao AI system and feature a system-level AI agent. In a post on its official Weibo account, nubia confirmed that the AI agent smartphone will make its debut at the upcoming World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC), which is scheduled to take place in Shanghai, China, from July 17 to July 20. While nubia has yet to reveal any details about the upcoming handset, a tipster claims it could...

title: Redmi Note 17 might have just run Geekbench revealing its chipset and RAM amount
description: A Xiaomi device with the model number 2607DRA18C has been spotted in the Geekbench online database. While the listing doesn't reveal the name of the device, past rumors have suggested that it could be the Redmi Note 17. A handset with the model number 2607DRA18I was recently certified for sale in India by BIS. The "I" at the end means it's meant for India, while the "C" at the end of the model number of the handset that ran Geekbench means it's meant for China. As you can see in the screenshot above, it managed a single-core score of 1,027 and a multi-core score of 3,002. It's...

title: Samsung Galaxy M67 emerges on Geekbench with forgotten Exynos chip
description: A yet-to-be-announced Samsung Galaxy M-series phone emerged in a Geekbench listing, and it brings a surprising chipset choice. The Samsung Galaxy SM-M676K, which is speculated to be the Galaxy M67, is seen rocking the Exynos 2200. That’s the same Samsung flagship SoC from 2022, which we saw on the Galaxy S22 series and Galaxy S23 FE later on. Galaxy SM-M676K Geekbench listing As a reminder, this is a 4nm chip featuring a 1+3+4 CPU setup with a max frequency clock of 2.8GHz. It also brought an Xclipse GPU (based on AMD RDNA2 architecture) and was the first mobile GPU with hardware...

title: Apple is already testing Chinese RAM, new report says
description: A few days ago some reports claimed Apple was considering using Chinese RAM from ChangXin Memory Technologies (CXMT) and Yangtze Memory Technologies (YMTC). Today, a new report claims the company is already testing DRAM chips from CXMT. But there's a twist. Allegedly, Apple would only be using the Chinese-made RAM for devices it will sell in China. That might be a way to minimize the backlash that could ensue from the Trump administration, seeing as how the US government has added both CXMT and YMTC to its Entity List, which identifies companies that have ties to the Chinese...

title: iPhone Ultra will launch on time, another report says
description: According to a new report from China, the iPhone Ultra, Apple’s first foldable smartphone, will be launching on time alongside the iPhone 18 Pro and iPhone 18 Pro Max, most likely in September. This information allegedly comes from multiple sources inside Apple's supply chain, and none of them have ever even heard of any delays. The iPhone Ultra being delayed (either in terms of introduction or availability) constituted a popular subject for rumors a while back, but this has since been contradicted by multiple other sources. iPhone Ultra leaked dummy unit Furthermore, the...

title: Pixel Watch 5 colors and pricing leak ahead of launch
description: Google is expected to unveil the Pixel Watch 5 alongside the Pixel 11 series on August 12. Ahead of the launch, new leaks have surfaced that reveal the smartwatch's expected pricing and color options. The Google Pixel Watch 5 is said to arrive in two sizes and four case colour options, with both Wi-Fi and LTE variants available. According to the leak, the 41mm Pixel Watch 5 will be offered in Dark Anthracite, Natural Silver, Pyrite, and Warm Gold finishes. The Dark Anthracite and Pyrite models are said to feature a satin finish, while the Natural Silver and Warm Gold variants will...

title: Apple loses bid to overturn its designation as a gatekeeper under EU's Digital Markets Act
description: In 2023, the European Union designated iOS, the App Store and Safari as “gatekeepers”. Apple has been unhappy with the rules this designation entails and has been fighting a lengthy legal battle. Apple tried to argue that it in fact has five app stores – one each for iPhones, iPads, Apple Watches, Apple TVs and Macs – and that they should not be treated as a single Core Platform Service (CPS). These are services which “play an indispensable role as an intermediary between businesses wishing to offer their services online and end users.” And in Apple’s view, only the iOS App Store cleared...

title: Apple's largest US manufacturing investment is official in partnership with Broadcom
description: Today Apple has announced its largest investment that's part of its American Manufacturing Program (AMP), which was initially unveiled in August of last year. Through AMP, Apple committed to investing a whopping $600 billion to bring manufacturing back to US soil. The just unveiled $30 billion agreement with Broadcom is part of that plan. Apple's new multi-year commitment with Broadcom is about designing and manufacturing custom silicon components and cutting-edge wireless connectivity technologies for a wide range of Apple products. This agreement will lead to the production of...

title: Android's upcoming automatic backup to PC feature excludes Samsung devices
description: Google is working on cloud-free automatic backup to Windows PCs for Android, according to a new report. This will work via Wi-Fi when your phone and PC are connected to the same network. In the latest version of the Google Play Services app, there's a hidden information page about this upcoming feature, which you can see below. At the bottom there's an intriguing note that says "Samsung phones aren't supported". While that seems weird, the exclusion may have something to do with the fact that Samsung has its own Smart Switch app, which already provides its customers with extensive...

title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8, Fold8 Ultra, Flip8, Watch9, and Watch Ultra2 renders leak
description: Samsung is holding its next Unpacked event on July 22 in London, the company has recently confirmed. Ahead of that, today a series of leaks has brought us official-looking renders for all of the smartphones and smartwatches that are expected to be unveiled at the event. So, without further ado, let's take a look, starting with the Galaxy Z Fold8, which will be the wide foldable intended to compete head-on with Apple's upcoming iPhone Ultra. Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 leaked renders It will be available in Cream, Graphite, and Lavender, with Pistachio being a colorway...
